zhRisk: 交期風險 / SCHEDULE：液冷機房施工、特種電氣改造工期依賴地方審批。
zhRisk_en: Schedule Risk / SCHEDULE: Liquid-cooled data-center construction and specialty electrical retrofits are dependent on local regulatory approvals.
zhRisk_zh-Hans: 交期风险 / SCHEDULE：液冷机房施工、特种电气改造工期依赖地方审批。
mitigation: M1啟動審批，並行施工+週進度里程碑
mitigation_en: Approvals initiated at M1; parallel construction with weekly progress milestones
mitigation_zh-Hans: M1启动审批，并行施工+周进度里程碑
